texto: Brush strokes write poetry harmonized through the cords of an artist's imagination.Color, contrast, simple compassion splattered across paper leaves tainted with the melody of the silent wind.Gasping, grasping, simply glancing at the souls of those who were not blessed with the visionary sight of inspirational artistry.
explicacao: Citação de Laura S. Al Bast sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Brush strokes write poetry harmonized through the cords of an artist's imagination.Color, contras…” articula motivacao, amateur, artistry em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e artistry.
